proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: Gauntlet recommends decreasing the Collateral Factor by 5% for various Compound v2 collateral assets (AAVE, BAT, COMP, LINK, MKR, SUSHI, UNI, YFI, ZRX) as part of Phase 11 of the v2 deprecation.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Decreases the Collateral Factor for AAVE, BAT, COMP, LINK, MKR, SUSHI, UNI, YFI, and ZRX by up to 5% to further deprecate the v2 market.
